specific_question: As of Q1 2025, had the new Elexion Automotive asset disposal policy developed by Olivia Martinez been approved across the firm's production lines?
answer: Internal company documents show that the new Elexion Automotive asset disposal policy that Olivia Martinez developed was approved on February 12, 2025, and rolled out company-wide on February 24, 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
